_comment: PORT-001 sibling reference — the claude-trading-view Combined Book's headline evidence, the FIXED target the Workbench reproduction is gated against (ADR 0030 #4). Export this from the sibling system on the data machine, fill the real numbers, save as sibling_reference.json (drop the .template), and pass via --reference. daily_returns + weights drive the gate's correlation criteria (the proof it is the SAME book, not merely similar summary stats), so they must be the sibling's actual per-day series + final sleeve/asset weights, not summaries.
